output.text:
<answer>```cpp
#include <hexi/hexi.h>
#include <vector>
#include <string>
#include <cstdint>

struct NetworkPacket {
    uint32_t packet_id;
    std::string username;
    std::vector<uint32_t> scores;
    std::string metadata;
    
    void serialise(auto& stream) {
        stream << packet_id;
        stream << static_cast<uint32_t>(username.length()) << username;
        stream << static_cast<uint32_t>(scores.size()) << scores;
        stream << metadata << '\0';
    }
};

std::vector<uint8_t> serialize_packet(const NetworkPacket& packet) {
    std::vector<uint8_t> buffer;
    hexi::allocators::default_allocator allocator;
    hexi::buffer_adaptor adaptor(buffer, allocator);
    hexi::ostream stream(adaptor);
    packet.serialise(stream);
    return buffer;
}
```</answer>

#include <hexi/hexi.h>
#include <vector>
#include <cstdint>
#include <span>

struct DataResult {
    uint8_t data_type;
    std::vector<uint32_t> int_items;
    std::vector<float> float_items;
};

DataResult preview_and_read_data(const std::span<const uint8_t> buffer) {

    if (buffer.size() < 5) {
        return DataResult{};
    }
    
    // Create a buffer adaptor from the span data
    hexi::buffer_adaptor adaptor(const_cast<uint8_t*>(buffer.data()), buffer.size());
    hexi::binary_stream stream(adaptor);
    
    DataResult result;
    
    // Read the data_type from the stream
    uint8_t data_type;
    stream.read<uint8_t>(data_type);
    result.data_type = data_type;
    
    // Read the item_count from the stream
    uint32_t item_count;
    stream.read<uint32_t>(item_count);
    
    // Calculate the required bytes for the items based on data_type
    size_t required_bytes = item_count * (data_type == 0 ? sizeof(uint32_t) : sizeof(float));
    
    // Check if the remaining buffer has enough data for the items

        return result; // Return with data_type set but empty items

        result.int_items.resize(item_count);
        for (size_t i = 0; i < item_count; ++i) {
            uint32_t value;
            stream.read<uint32_t>(value);
            result.int_items[i] = value;
        }

        result.float_items.resize(item_count);
        for (size_t i = 0; i < item_count; ++i) {

    return result;
}

output.text:
<answer>```cpp
#include <hexi/hexi.h>
#include <vector>
#include <cstdint>

bool write_data_with_check(std::vector<uint8_t>& buffer, uint32_t header, const std::vector<uint32_t>& items) {
    // Calculate required space: header (4 bytes) + items (each 4 bytes)
    size_t required_space = sizeof(uint32_t) + items.size() * sizeof(uint32_t);
    
    // Create buffer adaptor from the buffer
    hexi::buffer_adaptor adaptor(buffer.data(), buffer.size());
    
    // Check if there's enough available space
    if (adaptor.available() < required_space) {
        return false;
    }
    
    // Create binary stream for writing to the buffer adaptor
    hexi::binary_stream stream(adaptor);
    
    // Write the header
    stream.write(header);
    
    // Write the items container
    stream.write_container(items);
    
    return true;
}
```</answer>

#include <hexi/hexi.h>
#include <vector>
#include <cstdint>
#include <string>

struct UserData {
    uint32_t user_id;
    std::string name;
    
    void serialise(auto& adaptor) {
        adaptor(user_id, name);
    }
};

std::vector<uint8_t> write_and_serialise_packet(uint32_t header, const UserData& data) {
    std::vector<uint8_t> buffer;
    
    // Write header as raw bytes
    uint32_t hdr = header;
    auto* hdr_bytes = reinterpret_cast<uint8_t*>(&hdr);
    for (int i = 0; i < 4; i++) {
        buffer.push_back(hdr_bytes[i]);
    }
    
    // Serialize UserData using Hexi's append_to adaptor
    data.serialise(hexi::adaptors::append_to(buffer));
    
    return buffer;
}
```</answer>

output.text:
<answer>```cpp
#include <hexi/dynamic_buffer.h>
#include <vector>
#include <cstdint>

template<size_t block_size = 1024>
void write_to_dynamic_buffer(hexi::dynamic_buffer<block_size>& buffer, uint32_t header, const std::vector<uint8_t>& data) {
    buffer.write(reinterpret_cast<const uint8_t*>(&header), sizeof(header));
    buffer.write(data.data(), data.size());
}

template<size_t block_size = 1024>
struct BufferData {
    uint32_t header;
    std::vector<uint8_t> data;
};

BufferData<> read_from_dynamic_buffer(hexi::dynamic_buffer<1024>& buffer, size_t data_length) {
    BufferData<> result;
    buffer.read(reinterpret_cast<uint8_t*>(&result.header), sizeof(result.header));
    result.data.resize(data_length);
    buffer.read(result.data.data(), data_length);
    return result;
}
```</answer>

#include <hexi/allocators/block_allocator.h>

template<size_t element_count = 10>
void demonstrate_block_allocator_behavior() {
    hexi::block_allocator<sizeof(uint64_t), element_count> allocator;
    std::vector<void*> allocated_blocks;

    // Allocate some blocks

        void* block = allocator.allocate();

        std::cout << "Allocated block " << i+1 << " at " << block << std::endl;
    }

        allocator.deallocate(block);
        std::cout << "Deallocated block at " << block << std::endl;
    }

    // Reallocate and see if they come back in reverse order
    std::cout << "Reallocating blocks:" << std::endl;
    for (int i = 0; i < 3; ++i) {
        void* block = allocator.allocate();
        std::cout << "Reallocated block " << i+1 << " at " << block << std::endl;
        // Check if this matches the original order (LIFO)
        if (block == allocated_blocks[i]) {
            std::cout << "✓ Correctly reused block " << i+1 << std::endl;
        } else {
            std::cout << "✗ Block " << i+1 << " address mismatch!" << std::endl;
        }
    }
}
```

<answer>```cpp
#include <hexi/file_buffer.h>
#include <vector>
#include <cstdint>
#include <filesystem>
#include <stdexcept>

std::vector<uint8_t> preview_file_header(const std::filesystem::path& file_path, size_t header_size) {
    hexi::file_buffer file(file_path);
    if (!file.is_open()) {
        throw std::runtime_error("Failed to open file: " + file_path.string());
    }
    
    // Use peek to read header data without advancing the read pointer
    const uint8_t* header_data = file.peek(header_size);
    if (!header_data) {
        throw std::runtime_error("Failed to read header from file");
    }
    
    // Copy the data into the destination vector
    std::vector<uint8_t> header(header_data, header_data + header_size);
    return header;
}
```</answer>

output.text:
<answer>```cpp
#include <hexi/static_buffer.h>
#include <vector>
#include <cstdint>
#include <algorithm>

template<size_t buffer_size = 1024>
void write_data_to_buffer(hexi::static_buffer<std::byte, buffer_size>& buffer, const std::vector<uint8_t>& data) {
    size_t elements_to_write = std::min(data.size(), buffer_size);
    for (size_t i = 0; i < elements_to_write; ++i) {
        buffer[i] = std::byte(data[i]);
    }
}

template<size_t buffer_size = 1024>
std::vector<uint8_t> read_data_from_buffer(hexi::static_buffer<std::byte, buffer_size>& buffer, size_t bytes_to_read) {
    size_t bytes_available = buffer.size();
    size_t bytes_to_read_actual = std::min(bytes_to_read, bytes_available);
    std::vector<uint8_t> result;
    result.reserve(bytes_to_read_actual);
    for (size_t i = 0; i < bytes_to_read_actual; ++i) {
        result.push_back(static_cast<uint8_t>(buffer[i]));
    }
    return result;
}
```</answer>

#include <hexi/static_buffer.h>
#include <vector>
#include <cstdint>
#include <algorithm>

template<size_t buffer_size = 1024>
std::vector<uint8_t> preview_buffer_data(const hexi::static_buffer<std::byte, buffer_size>& buffer, size_t bytes_to_preview) {
    size_t available_bytes = std::min(bytes_to_preview, buffer.size());
    std::vector<uint8_t> result(available_bytes);
    if (available_bytes > 0) {
        const std::byte* data_ptr = buffer.read_ptr();
        for (size_t i = 0; i < available_bytes; ++i) {
            result[i] = static_cast<uint8_t>(data_ptr[i]);
        }
    }
    return result;
}
```</answer>

<answer>```cpp
#include <hexi/pmc/buffer_adaptor.h>
#include <vector>
#include <cstdint>
#include <cstring>

void peek_data_from_buffer(hexi::pmc::buffer_adaptor<std::vector<std::byte>>& buffer, void* data, std::size_t length) {
    buffer.copy(data, length);
}

template<typename T>
void peek_value_from_buffer(hexi::pmc::buffer_adaptor<std::vector<std::byte>>& buffer, T& value) {
    buffer.copy(value);
}

bool peek_and_compare(hexi::pmc::buffer_adaptor<std::vector<std::byte>>& buffer, const void* expected, std::size_t length) {
    std::vector<std::byte> temp(length);
    buffer.copy(temp.data(), length);
    
    const std::byte* expected_bytes = static_cast<const std::byte*>(expected);
    for (std::size_t i = 0; i < length; ++i) {
        if (temp[i] != expected_bytes[i]) {
            return false;
        }
    }
    return true;
}
```</answer>

#include <hexi/pmc/buffer_adaptor.h>
#include <hexi/pmc/buffer_read.h>
#include <vector>
#include <cstdint>

std::size_t find_byte_in_buffer(hexi::pmc::buffer_adaptor<std::vector<std::byte>>& buffer, std::byte value) {
    for (std::size_t i = 0; i < buffer.size(); ++i) {
        if (buffer.data()[i] == value) {
            return i;
        }
    }
    return hexi::pmc::buffer_read::npos;
}

std::size_t find_delimiter_position(hexi::pmc::buffer_adaptor<std::vector<std::byte>>& buffer, std::byte delimiter) {
    for (std::size_t i = 0; i < buffer.size(); ++i) {
        if (buffer.data()[i] == delimiter) {
            return i;
        }
    }
    return hexi::pmc::buffer_read::npos;
}

bool check_buffer_contains(hexi::pmc::buffer_adaptor<std::vector<std::byte>>& buffer, std::byte value) {
    for (std::size_t i = 0; i < buffer.size(); ++i) {
        if (buffer.data()[i] == value) {
            return true;
        }
    }
    return false;
}
```</answer>

#include <hexi/pmc/buffer_adaptor.h>
#include <vector>
#include <cstdint>

const void* get_read_pointer(hexi::pmc::buffer_adaptor<std::vector<std::byte>>& buffer) {
    return buffer.read_ptr();
}

struct BufferState {
    std::size_t size;
    const void* read_ptr;
    bool is_empty;
};

BufferState get_buffer_state(hexi::pmc::buffer_adaptor<std::vector<std::byte>>& buffer) {
    BufferState state;
    state.size = buffer.size();
    state.read_ptr = buffer.read_ptr();
    state.is_empty = buffer.size() == 0;
    return state;
}
```</answer>

#include <hexi/pmc/buffer_adaptor.h>

<answer>```cpp
#include <hexi/shared.h>
#include <hexi/pmc/buffer_adaptor.h>
#include <hexi/pmc/binary_stream_writer.h>
#include <hexi/pmc/binary_stream_reader.h>
#include <vector>
#include <cstdint>

using namespace hexi::detail;

template<typename T>
std::size_t encode_varint(hexi::pmc::binary_stream_writer& writer, T value) {
    std::size_t bytes_written = 0;
    auto unsigned_value = static_cast<std::make_unsigned_t<T>>(value);
    while (unsigned_value > 0x7F) {
        uint8_t byte = static_cast<uint8_t>(unsigned_value & 0x7F);
        byte |= 0x80;
        writer.write(&byte, 1);
        unsigned_value >>= 7;
        bytes_written++;
    }
    uint8_t byte = static_cast<uint8_t>(unsigned_value & 0x7F);
    writer.write(&byte, 1);
    return ++bytes_written;
}

template<typename T>
T decode_varint(hexi::pmc::binary_stream_reader& reader) {
    T result = 0;
    int shift = 0;
    uint8_t byte;
    do {
        reader.read(&byte, 1);
        result |= static_cast<T>(byte & 0x7F) << shift;
        shift += 7;
    } while (byte & 0x80);
    return result;
}

template<typename T>
bool encode_decode_roundtrip(T original_value) {
    std::vector<uint8_t> buffer;
    hexi::pmc::buffer_adaptor adaptor(buffer);
    hexi::pmc::binary_stream_writer writer(adaptor);
    hexi::pmc::binary_stream_reader reader(adaptor);

    // Encode the original value
    std::size_t bytes_written = encode_varint(writer, original_value);

    // Reset the reader to the beginning of the buffer
    reader.seek(0);

    // Decode the value
    T decoded_value = decode_varint<T>(reader);

    // Check if they match
    return decoded_value == original_value;
}

#include <hexi/hexi.h>
#include <string>
#include <string_view>

void write_string_prefixed_varint(hexi::binary_stream& stream, const std::string& str) {
    stream << hexi::prefixed_varint(str);
}

std::string read_string_prefixed_varint(hexi::binary_stream& stream) {
    std::string result;
    stream >> hexi::prefixed_varint(result);
    return result;
}

#include <hexi/shared.h>

using namespace hexi::detail;

bool check_regions_overlap(const void* src, std::size_t src_len, const void* dst, std::size_t dst_len) {

}

<answer>```cpp
#include <hexi/exception.h>
#include <string>
#include <cstddef>

struct ExceptionDetails {
    std::size_t read_size;
    std::size_t total_read;
    std::size_t limit_or_size;
    std::string message;
};

ExceptionDetails extract_underrun_info(const hexi::buffer_underrun& e) {
    ExceptionDetails details;
    details.read_size = e.read_size();
    details.total_read = e.total_read();
    details.limit_or_size = e.buff_size();
    details.message = e.what();
    return details;
}

ExceptionDetails extract_read_limit_info(const hexi::stream_read_limit& e) {
    ExceptionDetails details;
    details.read_size = e.read_size();
    details.total_read = e.total_read();
    details.limit_or_size = e.read_limit();
    details.message = e.what();
    return details;
}

std::string get_exception_message(const hexi::exception& e) {
    return e.what();
}
```</answer>

std::vector<uint8_t> serialize_compact_packet(const CompactPacket& packet) {
    std::vector<uint8_t> buffer;

    // Serialize packet_id as varint
    auto id_bytes = hexi::varint_encode(packet.packet_id);
    buffer.insert(buffer.end(), id_bytes.begin(), id_bytes.end());

    // Serialize tags vector size as varint
    auto tags_size_bytes = hexi::varint_encode(packet.tags.size());
    buffer.insert(buffer.end(), tags_size_bytes.begin(), tags_size_bytes.end());

    // Serialize each tag
    for (const auto& tag : packet.tags) {
        auto tag_len_bytes = hexi::varint_encode(tag.length());
        buffer.insert(buffer.end(), tag_len_bytes.begin(), tag_len_bytes.end());
        buffer.insert(buffer.end(), tag.begin(), tag.end());
    }

    // Serialize data length as varint
    auto data_len_bytes = hexi::varint_encode(packet.data.length());
    buffer.insert(buffer.end(), data_len_bytes.begin(), data_len_bytes.end());

    // Serialize data
    buffer.insert(buffer.end(), packet.data.begin(), packet.data.end());

    return buffer;
}

For deserialize_compact_packet:

CompactPacket deserialize_compact_packet(const std::span<const uint8_t> buffer) {
    CompactPacket packet;
    size_t pos = 0;

    // Deserialize packet_id
    packet.packet_id = hexi::varint_decode<uint32_t>(buffer, pos);

    // Deserialize tags size
    size_t tags_size = hexi::varint_decode<size_t>(buffer, pos);

    // Deserialize each tag
    packet.tags.reserve(tags_size);
    for (size_t i = 0; i < tags_size; ++i) {
        size_t tag_len = hexi::varint_decode<size_t>(buffer, pos);
        std::string tag(buffer.data() + pos, tag_len);
        pos += tag_len;
        packet.tags.push_back(std::move(tag));
    }

    // Deserialize data
    size_t data_len = hexi::varint_decode<size_t>(buffer, pos);
    packet.data.assign(buffer.data() + pos, data_len);
    pos += data_len;

    return packet;
}

<answer>```cpp
#include <hexi/hexi.h>
#include <string>
#include <cstdint>
#include <vector>

struct PaddedData {
    uint16_t header;
    std::string data;
    uint32_t footer;
};

std::vector<uint8_t> serialize_with_padding(const PaddedData& packet) {
    hexi::allocators::default_allocator allocator;
    std::vector<uint8_t> buffer;
    hexi::buffer_adaptor adaptor(buffer);
    hexi::stream stream(allocator, adaptor);

    // Write header
    stream.write(packet.header);
    
    // Write data length and data
    uint32_t data_length = static_cast<uint32_t>(packet.data.length());
    stream.write(data_length);
    stream.write(packet.data);
    
    // Write 16 bytes of padding filled with 0x00
    stream.fill<16>(0x00);
    
    // Write footer
    stream.write(packet.footer);

    return buffer;
}
```</answer>

#include <hexi/allocators/block_allocator.h>
#include <vector>
#include <memory>

struct PoolObject {
    int id;
    double value;
    
    // Default constructor required by block_allocator
    PoolObject() : id(0), value(0.0) {}
    
    PoolObject(int i, double v) : id(i), value(v) {}
};

std::vector<PoolObject*> create_object_pool(hexi::block_allocator<PoolObject, 10>& allocator) {
    std::vector<PoolObject*> pool;
    
    // Allocate and construct the first object
    PoolObject* obj1 = allocator.allocate();
    new (obj1) PoolObject(1, 1.5);
    pool.push_back(obj1);
    
    // Allocate and construct the second object
    PoolObject* obj2 = allocator.allocate();
    new (obj2) PoolObject(2, 2.5);
    pool.push_back(obj2);
    
    // Allocate and construct the third object
    PoolObject* obj3 = allocator.allocate();
    new (obj3) PoolObject(3, 3.5);
    pool.push_back(obj3);
    
    return pool;
}
```</answer>

<answer>```cpp
#include <hexi/pmc/buffer_base.h>
#include <vector>
#include <cstddef>

class CustomBuffer : public hexi::pmc::buffer_base {
    std::vector<std::byte> data_;
    
public:
    std::size_t size() const override {
        return data_.size();
    }
    
    bool empty() const override {
        return data_.empty();
    }
    
    // Helper method to add data (for testing)
    void add_data(const void* source, std::size_t length) {
        const std::byte* bytes = static_cast<const std::byte*>(source);
        data_.insert(data_.end(), bytes, bytes + length);
    }
    
    // Helper method to clear data (for testing)
    void clear() {
        data_.clear();
    }
};
```</answer>

};

Header peek_header_without_reading(const std::vector<uint8_t>& buffer) {
    hexi::pmc::buffer_read_adaptor adaptor(buffer);

#include <hexi/hexi.h>
#include <hexi/endian.h>
#include <vector>
#include <cstdint>
#include <span>

struct ProtocolPacket {
    uint32_t message_id;

};

struct ProtocolHeader {
    uint32_t message_id;
};

std::vector<uint8_t> serialize_protocol_packet(const ProtocolPacket& packet) {
    hexi::buffer_adaptor buffer;
    hexi::binary_stream stream(buffer);
    
    // Convert and write message_id
    uint32_t be_message_id = hexi::endian::native_to_big(packet.message_id);
    stream.write(be_message_id);
    
    // Convert each data value to big-endian and write container
    std::vector<uint16_t> be_data_values;
    for (auto val : packet.data_values) {
        be_data_values.push_back(hexi::endian::native_to_big(val));
    }
    stream.write_container(be_data_values);
    
    // Convert and write checksum
    uint32_t be_checksum = hexi::endian::native_to_big(packet.checksum);
    stream.write(be_checksum);
    
    return buffer.data();
}

ProtocolPacket deserialize_protocol_packet(const std::span<const uint8_t> buffer) {
    hexi::buffer_adaptor adaptor(buffer.data(), buffer.size());
    hexi::binary_stream stream(adaptor);
    
    ProtocolPacket packet;
    
    // Read and convert message_id
    uint32_t be_message_id;
    stream.read(be_message_id);
    packet.message_id = hexi::endian::big_to_native(be_message_id);
    
    // Read and convert data_values count
    uint32_t be_count;
    stream.read(be_count);
    uint32_t count = hexi::endian::big_to_native(be_count);
    
    // Read and convert data_values
    std::vector<uint16_t> be_data_values(count);
    stream.read_container(be_data_values);
    for (auto& val : be_data_values) {
        val = hexi::endian::big_to_native(val);
    }
    packet.data_values = std::move(be_data_values);
    
    // Read and convert checksum
    uint32_t be_checksum;
    stream.read(be_checksum);
    packet.checksum = hexi::endian::big_to_native(be_checksum);
    
    return packet;
}

ProtocolHeader extract_protocol_header(const std::span<const uint8_t> buffer) {
    hexi::buffer_adaptor adaptor(buffer.data(), buffer.size());
    hexi::binary_stream stream(adaptor);
    
    ProtocolHeader header;

}

struct MeasurementData {

    double pressure;
    
    void serialise(auto& adaptor) const {
        adaptor.write(sensor_id);
        for (float temp : temperatures) {
            float temp_le = hexi::endian::conditional_reverse(temp, std::endian::native, std::endian::little);
            adaptor.write(temp_le);

        adaptor.write(pressure_le);

        adaptor.read(sensor_id);
        for (float& temp : temperatures) {

            hexi::endian::little_to_native_inplace(temp);

        hexi::endian::little_to_native_inplace(pressure);
    }
};

}
